violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2025

The water filter housing for the soda machine was observed to be leaking into a funnel and was being disposed of into the mop sink. Plumbing systems shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2025
